First class was on 5 April 2023 in Bhiwadi, RJ.

Democratize Data Science

Making coding accessible to all.

2nd SARA
Bootcamp



The Ambedkar
Educational Society Sonipat

Schedule Overview

  • Around 25 hours of residential teaching in 3 days.

  • FREE for all Female participants.

  • No tuition fee. But three days food & accommodation charges Rs.3000 only for male participants.

  • Feedback on the last day of the event.

  • Thank You Ceremony! on Sunday, 22 Mar 2026, 7-8 PM 🚂

  • e-Certificate for the participation via email.

  • Course Website: https://sara-institute.quarto.pub/stats-course/

Daily Schedule:

  • Food
  • Lectures
Activity Time
Breakfast 08:30 AM to 09:30 AM
Lunch 01:30 PM to 02:30 PM
Dinner 07:30 PM to 08:30 PM
Activity Time
Class 1 10:00 AM to 11:30 AM
Discussion 30 minutes
Class 2 12:00 AM to 01:30 PM
Class 3 02:30 PM to 04:00 PM
Discussion 30 minutes
Class 4 04:30 PM to 06:00 PM

Code of Conduct

  • Be respectful and kind to everyone.

  • Ask questions freely – no question is too small.

  • Bring your own internet – mobile hotspot or data plan required.

  • Arrive 5 minutes early to settle in before each session.

  • Location: All classes will be held at Mata Ramabai Auditorium, 1st Floor, Dr. Ambedkar Bhawan.
